public class Conditional extends Operator
The most weird ternary C operator ?:

  • Constructor Details

    • Conditional

      public Conditional(ExtList children)
      Conditional.
      Parameters:
      children - list of children the first one is the guard expression, the second one the then expression and the last one the else expr.

    • isLeftAssociative

      public boolean isLeftAssociative()
      Checks if this operator is left or right associative. Conditionals are right associative.
      Overrides:
      isLeftAssociative in class Operator
      Returns:
      true, if the operator is left associative, false otherwise.
